name: Cepeginterferon alfa-2B
description: Cepeginterferon alfa-2B is under investigation in clinical trial NCT01889433 (An Open-label Comparative Efficacy and Safety Study of Algeron (Cepeginterferon Alfa-2b) in Treatment-naive Patients With Chronic Hepatitis C).

interactions.name: Ambroxol acefyllinate
interactions.description: The metabolism of Ambroxol acefyllinate can be decreased when combined with Cepeginterferon alfa-2B.

interactions.name: Theophylline
interactions.description: The metabolism of Theophylline can be decreased when combined with Cepeginterferon alfa-2B.

interactions.name: Dyphylline
interactions.description: The metabolism of Dyphylline can be decreased when combined with Cepeginterferon alfa-2B.

interactions.name: Aminophylline
interactions.description: The metabolism of Aminophylline can be decreased when combined with Cepeginterferon alfa-2B.

interactions.name: Zidovudine
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Cepeginterferon alfa-2B is combined with Zidovudine.
